title: Quick Ciabatta
excerpt: Ingredients 500 g flour 500 ml water 10 g instant yeast 8 g salt a little extra flour for the baking tray Method Place all the ingredients (except the extra flour) in your food processor and mix with the dough beater (K-Beater) for 12 minutes. html:
Ingredients

  • 500 g flour
  • 500 ml water
  • 10 g instant yeast
  • 8 g salt
  • a little extra flour for the baking tray

Method

Place all the ingredients (except the extra flour) in your food processor and mix with the dough beater (K-Beater) for 12 minutes.

Meanwhile, spray a baking tray with non-stick spray and lightly sprinkle a little extra flour over the tray.

Once the dough is well mixed, place it on the baking tray and shape it into a loaf with your fingertips.

Bake at 200 ºC for 40 – 45 minutes.

Makes one medium-sized loaf.

Easy!
